% Auto-generated PGFPlots template — grouped vertical bars (ggplot-like)
% Ensure required packages when included standalone in lint/preview
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{pgfplotsversion}{\RequirePackage{pgfplots}}{}
\@ifundefined{pgfplotstableread}{\RequirePackage{pgfplotstable}}{}
\makeatother
% Data: new_plots/data/score_by_task_type_mean_wide.csv
\tikzset{external/export next=false}

\begingroup
% ------- configurable knobs -------
% overall size (avoid digits in macro names)
\newcommand{\PerfTaskPlotWidth}{.88\linewidth}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskPlotHeight}{7em}
% typography
\newcommand{\PerfTaskFont}{\scriptsize}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskXFont}{\tiny}
% bar geometry
\setlength{\PerfTaskBarWidth}{4pt}
\setlength{\PerfTaskBarSep}{4.4pt} % adjacent bars touch
% margins
\newcommand{\PerfTaskEnlargeX}{0.08}
\newcommand{\PerfTaskEnlargeY}{0.04}
% ---------------------------------

% color palette provided centrally in main.tex: PerfClaude, PerfGemini, PerfHuman, PerfOThree, PerfAutumnSim

% load combined mean+SEM table (wide)
\pgfplotstableread[col sep=comma]{new_plots/data/stoch_vs_det.csv}{\perftablesrc}
\begin{tikzpicture}[baseline={(current axis.south)}]
      \begin{axis}[
                  % title={Mean Score by Task Type and Agent},
                  ylabel={Score},
                  tick label style={font=\PerfTaskFont},
                  xticklabel style={font=\PerfTaskXFont, rotate=20, anchor=east, yshift=0pt},
                  xtick=data,
                  % modern, ggplot-like styling
                  grid=none,
                  axis background/.style={fill=PlotBackground},
                  axis lines=left,
                  axis line style={draw=none},
                  x axis line style={draw=none},
                  axis y line*=left,
                  y axis line style={draw=black, -, xshift=-3pt},
                  tick style={draw=none},
                  ytick style={draw=black, xshift=-3pt},
                  yticklabel style={xshift=-1pt},
                  ytick pos=left,
                  tick align=outside,
                  legend style={font=\PerfTaskFont, draw=none, fill=none, at={(0.5,1.05)}, anchor=south},
                  legend image code/.code={\draw[#1,draw=none] (0cm,-0.08cm) rectangle (0.28cm,0.08cm);},
                  legend columns=2,
                  label style={font=\PerfTaskFont, at={(ticklabel* cs:0.5)}, anchor=south, yshift=5pt},
                  title style={font=\PerfTaskFont},
                  scale only axis=true,
                  width=\PerfTaskPlotWidth,
                  height=\PerfTaskPlotHeight,
                  ymin=0,
                  ymax=1,
                  ytick distance=1,
                  unbounded coords=discard,
                  symbolic x coords={o3, claude-4-sonnet, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, qwen3-235b-a22b-thinking-2507, oracle, human},
                  bar width=\PerfTaskBarWidth,
                  enlarge x limits=\PerfTaskEnlargeX,
                  enlarge y limits={upper, value=\PerfTaskEnlargeY},
            ]
            % oracle,0.5079346677377056,0.06779241266425819,0.40797147693105873,0.05668887521141108

            % grouped vertical bars per task type with error bars (SEM)
            \addplot+[ybar, bar shift=\dimexpr-0.5\PerfTaskBarSep\relax, draw=none, fill=PerfDeterministic, mark=none,
                  error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
                  error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, xshift=-0.5\PerfTaskBarSep},
                  error mark=|,
                  error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt, xshift=-0.5\PerfTaskBarSep}]
            table [x={source}, y={deterministic}, y error=deterministic_sem,
                        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}] {\perftablesrc};
            \addplot+[ybar, bar shift=\dimexpr+0.5\PerfTaskBarSep\relax, draw=none, fill=PerfStochastic, mark=none,
                  error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
                  error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, xshift=0.5\PerfTaskBarSep},
                  error mark=|,
                  error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt, xshift=0.5\PerfTaskBarSep}]
            table [x={source}, y={stochastic}, y error=stochastic_sem,
                        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}] {\perftablesrc};
            % legend with color patches (not lines)
            % legend using solid color patches (not dashed lines)
            \addlegendimage{ybar,ybar legend, draw=none, fill={PerfDeterministic}}\addlegendentry{deterministic}
            \addlegendimage{ybar,ybar legend, draw=none, fill={PerfStochastic}}\addlegendentry{stochastic}
      \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\endgroup
